content.en:
After a while.

"Special energy fluctuations, could it be the Demon Ancient Flower?"

Ye Tian said darkly.

If it's really a magic ancient flower, this time the luck is quite good.

Wow!

Ye Tian shuttled over, and on the way he encountered a monster comparable to the level of a half-step Eternal Master.

He had the strength to kill the opponent, but he didn't.

It's just enough to kill some ordinary monsters, if you kill a monster comparable to the level of a half-step eternal master, it is very likely to offend the demon mountain master, because these monsters may have something to do with the demon mountain master.

Therefore, Ye Tian only severely injured these monsters that were comparable to the level of a half-step Eternal Master, and did not kill them.

"This is it!"

Ye Tian probed carefully and sensed a Demon Ancient Flower.

The Mogu flower is black, very black and very bewitching, three feet high, with eighteen petals.

The year of the Demon Ancient Flower is related to the number of petals, it is rumored that one petal will be born when it grows in 10,000 Realms of River years, and this Magic Ancient Flower has 18 petals, which means that it has grown 180,000 Realms of River years.

In Modu Mountain, a Mogu flower can grow for 180,000 years, which is already very good.

Ye Tian found that there was also a powerful monster sleeping in 690 near this Demon Ancient Flower, and the other party was a black giant snake, like a black mountain range.

Ye Tian descended here and directly used the space-time control technique of the space-time forbidden domain.

Airplanes!!!

Space-time freezes.

The black giant snake monster opened its star-like eyes, trying to break free from the space-time confinement, but its strength was much weaker than Ye Tian's, so it could only cause space-time shocks for a while.

It seems that layers of time and space are shattered all the time, but they still can't break free.

I saw that Ye Tian used three thousand void hands, directly grabbed the black giant snake monster, hit it hard, and threw it towards another area of the Demon Capital Mountain.

Boom!

The opponent's body slammed into a mountain wall, and the injury worsened again.

The other party didn't dare to provoke Ye Tian, and immediately fled.

Immediately, Ye Tian took this Demon Ancient Flower away.

There are a total of thirty-three layers of space-time areas in Modu Mountain, and Ye Tian is currently in the first-layer space-time area, and the area of this layer of space-time area is the largest, but there are relatively few good things.

Ye Tian stayed here for a few more days, and then he found a few Demon Ancient Flowers, and he couldn't find them again.

No way, there may be half-step Eternal Masters here from time to time, and there are many powerful Half-Step Eternal Masters among them.

Therefore, I am afraid that this place is almost scraped.

If you want to get more Demon Ancient Flowers, you have to go to other space-time regions.

In the following days, Ye Tian continued to look for the Demon Ancient Flower in the space-time area above the second layer.

Although the Demon Ancient Flower was difficult to find, Ye Tian's copying talent could spy on the existence of any monster, and if he found the monster, it was possible to find the Demon Ancient Flower, so it was not difficult for him to find the Demon Ancient Flower.

Time passed slowly, and the number of Demon Ancient Flowers that Ye Tian obtained became more and more.

Thirty floors.

Ye Tian had been on this floor for some years, but he hadn't entered the thirty-first floor, because above the thirtieth floor, it was a forbidden area, and half-step Eternal Masters couldn't enter, if anyone entered, it would be looking for death.

And.

He had been in the Demon Capital Mountain long enough, and if he had exceeded a certain amount of time, he would be expelled, and a half-step Eternal Master could only come to the Demon Capital Mountain once.

If it weren't for the restrictions, the Demon Ancient Flowers here would have been taken away by the half-step Eternal Masters of the outside world.

And at this time.

The Demon Mountain Master is still paying attention to Ye Tian.

"This little guy's strength is so strong, he obviously only controls the Supreme Legendary Body for forty percent, but his real combat power is comparable to a half-step eternal controller who controls eighty percent of the Supreme Legendary Body, and he is really demonic!"

The Demon Mountain Master is not worried that the other party will fall here, and he is ready to give it a little benefit.

Although he is evil, he is only bullying the weak, and he is still willing to give some benefits to the strong and the existence of backgrounds, at least the other party will not deal with him in the future, maybe one day he can find the other party for help.

"This little guy is very talented, and he has a relationship with the Ten Elements Ancestor, so it's better to give him that opportunity. "

The master of the Demon Mountain said secretly.

So, he descended directly to the thirtieth floor.

......

Rumble!!!!

Time and space were suddenly no longer under his control, and this change made Ye Tian's expression change.

The next moment.

An Eternal Master appeared before him.

Ye Tian looked at it, the other party was very large, his appearance was very hideous, there were two black tentacles on his head, and his body was densely covered with black lines.

Ye Tian didn't have to guess to know who it was.

"I've seen the Demon Mountain Master!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

The eternal controller who can appear in the Demon Capital Mountain, except for the Demon Mountain Master, there is no one else.

"Little guy, you have a good talent!" said with a smile, "My Demon Mountain loves geniuses the most, and I am helpful, and I think we are destined, so I want to give you a chance." "

Helpful?

Ye Tian wanted to complain, he knew very well the temperament of the controller of the Demon Mountain, if he was a half-step eternal controller with no origin, the moment he entered the Demon Capital Mountain, he would be devoured by the other party.

Moreover, a long time ago, the Demon Mountain Master devoured countless cultivators, and in the end, he was suppressed by several Eternal Masters, so he shrank in the Demon Capital Mountain.

Therefore, helpfulness has nothing to do with the master of the Magic Mountain.

"It seems that I have the mark of that great existence on my body, and the master of the Demon Mountain senses it, so he wants to make peace with me. Ye Tian guessed.

All in all, it's a good thing for him.

"Thank you Demon Mountain Master!" Ye Tian thanked.

"Let's go, I'll take you there!"

The master of the Demon Mountain directly brought Ye Tian into the thirty-third layer of the Demon Capital Mountain, which was the forbidden area of the Demon Capital Mountain, but now Ye Tian came in.

I saw that Ye Tian appeared in front of a black cave.

The master of the Demon Mountain pointed to the entrance of the cave and introduced: "This is the place where the Demon Capital Mountain has existed since its birth, and every life can enter it once, and once someone enters it, at least within ten million realms, it will not be possible to enter the second life." In addition, the treasure land that each life enters is different, but they will encounter great benefits. After I became the Eternal Master, even if I entered, I would not see any treasures. "

"Such a weird place!"

Ye Tian was slightly surprised, but also very curious.

Immediately, Ye Tian stepped into this cave and entered this mysterious place. _
